mano_cua.result_summary: Pressable组件role=button时，Enter键正常触发onPress，但Space键仅触发onPressIn/onPressOut未触发onPress。不符合ARIA按钮规范，bug确认
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Space key does NOT trigger onPress callback on Pressable with role=button (only triggers onPressIn and onPressOut). Enter key works correctly triggering full onPressIn→onPress→onPressOut sequence. Bug confirmed: Space key onPress is missing.
